zh.Clapham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭素可可拉法姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Sidney於大約1440年出生時，她的父親William Sidney III53歲，母親Elizabeth Ceselye Mitchell46歲。她於1457年與John Michelgrove在英國英格蘭素可可拉法姆結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1480年享年42歲。

zh-hans.Clapham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰素可可拉法姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Sidney于大约1440年出生时，她的父亲William Sidney III53岁，母亲Elizabeth Ceselye Mitchell46岁。她于1457年与John Michelgrove在英国英格兰素可可拉法姆结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1480年享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sidney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Sidney Farm in Alfold (Surrey), from Old English sīd ‘large, spacious, long’ (dative sīdan) + ēg ‘island’.
possibly also a habitational name from any of the places called Saint-Denis in Normandy, named from the dedication of their churches to Saint Dionysius (see   Dennis  ).

variants.name: Dennis
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Denis(e), Dinis(e), vernacular forms of Latin Dionysius, Greek Dionysios ‘(follower) of Dionysos’, an eastern god introduced to the classical pantheon at a relatively late date and bearing a name of probably Semitic origin. The name was borne by various early Christian saints, including Saint Denis, the martyred 3rd-century bishop of Paris who became the patron saint of France. From the 12th century onward, the popularity of the name in England (and of its cognates, mainly Denis , in the continental Europe) seems to have been largely due to French influence. The feminine form Dionysia (in vernacular English likewise Den(n)is) is also found, and some examples of the surname may originate from it.
English: from Middle English deneis, a variant of danais ‘Danish’, with the vowel influenced by Middle English denshe (Old English denisc). Compare Dence .

Irish (mainly Dublin and Cork): of the same origin as 1 and 2 above, sometimes an alternative form to Donohue but more often to McDonough , since the personal name Donnchadh was Anglicized as Donough or Denis.

variants.name: Sydney
meanings: English and Scottish (Midlothian): variant of   Sidney  .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Sidney was born about 1440, her father, William Sidney III, was 53 and her mother, Elizabeth Ceselye Mitchell, was 46. She married John Michelgrove in 1457, in Clapham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died about 1480, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Sidney est née environ 1440, son père, William Sidney III, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Ceselye Mitchell, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé John Michelgrove en 1457, à Clapham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1480, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Sidney um 1440 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Sidney III 53 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Ceselye Mitchell 46. Sie hat 1457 in Clapham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom John Michelgrove geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1480 im Alter von 42 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Sidney è nata il circa 1440, sua padre, William Sidney III, aveva 53 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Ceselye Mitchell, aveva 46 anni. Lei sposato John Michelgrove nel 1457, nel Clapham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1480, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Sidneyが約1440年に生まれた時，父William Sidney IIIは53歳，母Elizabeth Ceselye Mitchellは46歳であった。1457年にイギリスイギリススセックスクラファムでJohn Michelgroveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1480年に42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Sidney(이)가 대략 1440년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Sidney III(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Ceselye Mitchell(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 1457년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 클라프아에서 John Michelgrove(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1480년 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Sidney nasceu aproximadamente 1440, seu pai, William Sidney III, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Ceselye Mitchell, tinha 46 anos. Ela casou-se com John Michelgrove em 1457, em Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1480, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Sidney родилась около 1440 г., её отцу по имени William Sidney III было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Ceselye Mitchell, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Michelgrove в 1457 г. в местности клафам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1480 г. в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Sidney nació aproximadamente 1440, su papá, William Sidney III, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Ceselye Mitchell, tenía 46 años. Se casó con John Michelgrove en 1457, en Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1480, a la edad de 42 años.
